nodes.name: Manual Trigger (dev)
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for local testing and portfolio demonstration.

nodes.name: Lead Webhook (prod placeholder)
nodes.notes: Production entry point for website forms, landing pages, ad forms or CRM webhooks. Configure auth and payload mapping for client use.

nodes.name: Set Example Lead Input
nodes.notes: Demo payload. Replace with webhook, CRM polling, paid ads forms or product sign-up data in production.

nodes.name: Validate Lead / Control Config
nodes.notes: Validates lead payload, applies defaults, creates idempotency keys and records data-handling controls.

nodes.name: Enrich Company Data
nodes.notes: Placeholder for Clearbit/Apollo/ZoomInfo/CRM firmographic enrichment. Returns structured source status.

nodes.name: Enrich Tech Stack
nodes.notes: Placeholder for BuiltWith/Wappalyzer/internal technology lookup. Returns structured source status.

nodes.name: Enrich Intent Signals
nodes.notes: Placeholder for website/product/ad engagement events. Returns structured source status.

nodes.name: Lookup CRM History
nodes.notes: Placeholder for CRM duplicate/history lookup. Returns structured source status.

nodes.name: Aggregate Enrichment Results
nodes.notes: Combines enrichment branch outputs, records source freshness, missing-source warnings and degraded-source status.

nodes.name: Prepare Source Failure Alerts
nodes.notes: Creates operations alert payloads for failed, empty or partial enrichment sources.

nodes.name: Score and Route Lead
nodes.notes: Applies deterministic scoring and routing rules. The score and route are the decision source for CRM and sales notifications.

nodes.name: Prepare Optional LLM Qualification Prompt
nodes.notes: Prepares a data-minimised, tightly bounded prompt for qualification wording. Deterministic score and route remain authoritative.

nodes.name: Call Local LLM Qualification
nodes.notes: Calls the local LLM endpoint with bounded generation controls. n_predict/max_tokens are set and no stop token is used because stop-only responses can produce empty content.

nodes.name: Extract Qualification Summary
nodes.notes: Normalises LLM response shapes into llm_summary and falls back deterministically on empty or oversized content while preserving original lead context.

nodes.name: Build Deterministic Qualification Fallback
nodes.notes: Creates deterministic qualification wording when the optional LLM call fails.

nodes.name: Prepare CRM Upsert (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares CRM upsert payload with idempotency key. Replace with CRM connector in production.

nodes.name: Prepare Sales Notification (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares Slack/Teams/email notification payload for the selected sales route.

nodes.name: Prepare Enrichment Log (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares durable logging payload for enrichment and scoring results.

nodes.name: Build Final Enriched Lead
nodes.notes: Builds the final enriched/scored lead object and audit record for durable storage.
